scenarios.name: order_rollup
scenarios.description: Order-detail revenue rollup over a representative order range.
scenarios.plan:
Select Expression
    -> First N Records
        -> Sort (record length: 68, key length: 24)
            -> Aggregate
                -> Sort (record length: 118, key length: 40)
                    -> Nested Loop Join (inner)
                        -> Filter
                            -> Table "Orders" as "O" Access By ID
                                -> Bitmap
                                    -> Index "RDB$PRIMARY5" Range Scan (lower bound: 1/1, upper bound: 1/1)
                        -> Filter
                            -> Table "Order Details" as "OD" Access By ID
                                -> Bitmap
                                    -> Index "FK_Order_Details_d945128a6c" Range Scan (full match)

scenarios.name: product_sales_rollup
scenarios.description: Aggregated sales totals by product over the reporting fixture.
scenarios.plan:
Select Expression
    -> First N Records
        -> Sort (record length: 76, key length: 32)
            -> Aggregate
                -> Nested Loop Join (inner)
                    -> Filter
                        -> Table "Order Details" as "OD" Access By ID
                            -> Index "FK_Order_Details_4d059fd75a" Range Scan (lower bound: 1/1, upper bound: 1/1)
                    -> Filter
                        -> Table "Orders" as "O" Access By ID
                            -> Bitmap
                                -> Index "RDB$PRIMARY5" Unique Scan
